description: Sibling binary owning the CODE worktree (git worktree of project repo on work/<id>). Kind-blind, stateless-across-ops (derived path = f(binding,id)). Hooks: claim.post materialize, close.pre deliver (squash→integration, sorts last), close.post teardown (+cwd guard), unclaim/drop.post release. delivered_in = git-log-grep query. §14 rollback tiers.
title: §11 delivery/worktree plugin (direct variant)
